#define RAIN_UPDATE_INTERVAL_MS 100.0

Functions

EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE void mirror_cleanup (void )

Definition at line 102 of file mirror.c.

102                           {
103   if (g_digital_rain) {
104     digital_rain_destroy(g_digital_rain);
105     g_digital_rain = NULL;
106   }
107   if (g_last_rain_output) {
108     SAFE_FREE(g_last_rain_output);
109     g_last_rain_output = NULL;
110   }
111   options_state_destroy();
112   platform_destroy();
113 }

EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  char * mirror_convert_frame (uint8_t * rgba_data, int src_width, int
  src_height)


Definition at line 120 of file mirror.c.


120                                                                               {
121   if (!rgba_data || src_width <= 0 || src_height <= 0) {
122     return NULL;
123   }
124 
125   g_frame_count++;
126   // Derive a time value from frame count using actual target FPS from options
127   int target_fps = (int)GET_OPTION(fps);
128   if (target_fps <= 0) {
129     target_fps = 60; // Default to 60 FPS if not set
130   }
131   float time_seconds = (float)g_frame_count / (float)target_fps;
132 
133   // Get current settings from options or terminal detection
134   int dst_width = (int)terminal_get_effective_width();
135   int dst_height = (int)terminal_get_effective_height();
136   color_filter_t filter = (color_filter_t)GET_OPTION(color_filter);
137   terminal_color_mode_t color_mode = (terminal_color_mode_t)GET_OPTION(color_mode);
138   if (g_frame_count <= 3 || g_frame_count % 120 == 0) {
139     log_debug("frame=%u color_filter=%d color_mode=%d", g_frame_count, (int)filter, (int)color_mode);
140   }
141   if (color_mode == TERM_COLOR_AUTO) {
142     color_mode = TERM_COLOR_TRUECOLOR; // xterm.js supports truecolor
143   }
144   palette_type_t palette_type = (palette_type_t)GET_OPTION(palette_type);
145   bool preserve_aspect_ratio = true; // Preserve webcam aspect ratio
146   bool stretch = false;              // Don't stretch - maintain proportions
147 
148   // Build terminal capabilities structure with user's color mode
149   terminal_capabilities_t caps = {0}; // Zero-initialize all fields first
150   caps.color_level = color_mode;
151   caps.capabilities = 0;
152   caps.color_count = (color_mode == TERM_COLOR_NONE)  ? 0
153                      : (color_mode == TERM_COLOR_16)  ? 16
154                      : (color_mode == TERM_COLOR_256) ? 256
155                                                       : 16777216;
156   caps.utf8_support = true;
157   caps.detection_reliable = true;
158   caps.render_mode = (render_mode_t)GET_OPTION(render_mode);
159   caps.wants_background = (caps.render_mode == RENDER_MODE_BACKGROUND);
160   caps.wants_padding = true;
161   caps.palette_type = palette_type;
162   caps.desired_fps = 60;
163   caps.color_filter = filter;
164 
165   // Convert RGBA to RGB (strip alpha channel) and optionally flip horizontally
166   rgb_pixel_t *rgb_pixels = SAFE_MALLOC(src_width * src_height * sizeof(rgb_pixel_t), rgb_pixel_t *);
167   if (!rgb_pixels) {
168     return NULL;
169   }
170 
171   bool flip_x = GET_OPTION(flip_x);
172   bool flip_y = GET_OPTION(flip_y);
173   for (int y = 0; y < src_height; y++) {
174     for (int x = 0; x < src_width; x++) {
175       int src_x = flip_x ? (src_width - 1 - x) : x;
176       int src_y = flip_y ? (src_height - 1 - y) : y;
177       int src_idx = (src_y * src_width + src_x) * 4;
178       int dst_idx = y * src_width + x;
179 
180       rgb_pixels[dst_idx].r = rgba_data[src_idx + 0];
181       rgb_pixels[dst_idx].g = rgba_data[src_idx + 1];
182       rgb_pixels[dst_idx].b = rgba_data[src_idx + 2];
183       // Alpha (rgba_data[src_idx + 3]) is discarded
184     }
185   }
186 
187   // Apply color filter to pixels if needed (except rainbow - handled in ANSI stage)
188   if (filter != COLOR_FILTER_NONE && filter != COLOR_FILTER_RAINBOW) {
189     // color_filter operates on packed RGB24 format
190     uint8_t *rgb24 = (uint8_t *)rgb_pixels;
191     int stride = src_width * 3;
192     apply_color_filter(rgb24, src_width, src_height, stride, filter, time_seconds);
193   }
194 
195   // Create image structure
196   image_t img = {.w = src_width, .h = src_height, .pixels = rgb_pixels, .alloc_method = IMAGE_ALLOC_SIMD};
197 
198   // Get palette characters based on selected palette type
199   const char *palette_chars;
200   switch (palette_type) {
201   case PALETTE_BLOCKS:
202     palette_chars = PALETTE_CHARS_BLOCKS;
203     break;
204   case PALETTE_DIGITAL:
205     palette_chars = PALETTE_CHARS_DIGITAL;
206     break;
207   case PALETTE_MINIMAL:
208     palette_chars = PALETTE_CHARS_MINIMAL;
209     break;
210   case PALETTE_COOL:
211     palette_chars = PALETTE_CHARS_COOL;
212     break;
213   case PALETTE_CUSTOM:
214     // Custom palette uses user-provided characters from options
215     palette_chars = GET_OPTION(palette_custom);
216     if (!palette_chars || palette_chars[0] == '\0') {
217       palette_chars = PALETTE_CHARS_STANDARD; // Fallback
218     }
219     break;
220   case PALETTE_STANDARD:
221   default:
222     palette_chars = PALETTE_CHARS_STANDARD;
223     break;
224   }
225 
226   // Convert to ASCII using capability-aware function
227   char *ascii_output = ascii_convert_with_capabilities(&img, dst_width, dst_height, &caps, preserve_aspect_ratio,
228                                                        stretch, palette_chars);
229 
230   // Clean up
231   SAFE_FREE(rgb_pixels);
232 
233   if (!ascii_output) {
234     log_error("ascii_convert_with_capabilities returned NULL");
235     return NULL;
236   }
237 
238   // Apply rainbow color filter to ANSI output by replacing RGB values
239   // This preserves character selection while applying rainbow colors
240   if (filter == COLOR_FILTER_RAINBOW) {
241     char *rainbow_output = rainbow_replace_ansi_colors(ascii_output, time_seconds);
242     if (rainbow_output) {
243       SAFE_FREE(ascii_output);
244       ascii_output = rainbow_output;
245     }
246   }
247 
248   bool matrix_rain = GET_OPTION(matrix_rain);
249   if (matrix_rain) {
250     // Initialize digital rain context if needed or dimensions changed
251     if (!g_digital_rain || g_digital_rain->num_columns != dst_width || g_digital_rain->num_rows != dst_height) {
252       if (g_digital_rain) {
253         digital_rain_destroy(g_digital_rain);
254       }
255       if (g_last_rain_output) {
256         SAFE_FREE(g_last_rain_output);
257         g_last_rain_output = NULL;
258       }
259       g_digital_rain = digital_rain_init(dst_width, dst_height);
260       if (!g_digital_rain) {
261         log_error("Failed to initialize digital rain effect");
262         return ascii_output; // Return without effect on error
263       }
264       g_last_rain_update_time = emscripten_get_now();
265     }
266 
267     // Update color from active filter (allows filter changes after initialization)
268     digital_rain_set_color_from_filter(g_digital_rain, filter);
269 
270     // Time-based updates: only update effect every RAIN_UPDATE_INTERVAL_MS
271     double current_time = emscripten_get_now();
272     double elapsed_ms = current_time - g_last_rain_update_time;
273 
274     if (elapsed_ms >= RAIN_UPDATE_INTERVAL_MS) {
275       // Calculate actual delta time in seconds
276       float delta_time = (float)(elapsed_ms / 1000.0);
277       g_last_rain_update_time = current_time;
278 
279       // Apply effect and cache a copy
280       char *rain_output = digital_rain_apply(g_digital_rain, ascii_output, delta_time);
281       if (rain_output) {
282         // Free old cached output
283         if (g_last_rain_output) {
284           SAFE_FREE(g_last_rain_output);
285         }
286         // Cache a copy (we'll return the original rain_output)
287         g_last_rain_output = strdup(rain_output);
288         // Return the rain output (caller will free it)
289         SAFE_FREE(ascii_output);
290         ascii_output = rain_output;
291       }
292     } else if (g_last_rain_output) {
293       // Use cached output
294       SAFE_FREE(ascii_output);
295       ascii_output = strdup(g_last_rain_output);
296     }
297   } else {
298     // Clean up digital rain context if it exists but effect is disabled
299     if (g_digital_rain) {
300       digital_rain_destroy(g_digital_rain);
301       g_digital_rain = NULL;
302     }
303     if (g_last_rain_output) {
304       SAFE_FREE(g_last_rain_output);
305       g_last_rain_output = NULL;
306     }
307     g_last_rain_update_time = 0.0;
308   }
309 
310   return ascii_output;
311 }






References apply_color_filter(),
    ascii_convert_with_capabilities(), rgb_pixel_t::b,
    terminal_capabilities_t::capabilities,
    terminal_capabilities_t::color_count,
    terminal_capabilities_t::color_filter, COLOR_FILTER_NONE,
    COLOR_FILTER_RAINBOW, terminal_capabilities_t::color_level,
    terminal_capabilities_t::desired_fps,
    terminal_capabilities_t::detection_reliable,
    digital_rain_apply(), digital_rain_destroy(),
    digital_rain_init(), digital_rain_set_color_from_filter(),
    rgb_pixel_t::g, GET_OPTION, IMAGE_ALLOC_SIMD,
    log_debug, log_error, PALETTE_BLOCKS,
    PALETTE_CHARS_BLOCKS, PALETTE_CHARS_COOL,
    PALETTE_CHARS_DIGITAL, PALETTE_CHARS_MINIMAL,
    PALETTE_CHARS_STANDARD, PALETTE_COOL, PALETTE_CUSTOM,
    PALETTE_DIGITAL, PALETTE_MINIMAL, PALETTE_STANDARD,
    terminal_capabilities_t::palette_type, rgb_pixel_t::r,
    RAIN_UPDATE_INTERVAL_MS, rainbow_replace_ansi_colors(),
    terminal_capabilities_t::render_mode, RENDER_MODE_BACKGROUND,
    SAFE_FREE, SAFE_MALLOC, TERM_COLOR_16,
    TERM_COLOR_256, TERM_COLOR_AUTO, TERM_COLOR_NONE,
    TERM_COLOR_TRUECOLOR, terminal_get_effective_height(),
    terminal_get_effective_width(),
    terminal_capabilities_t::utf8_support,
    terminal_capabilities_t::wants_background, and
    terminal_capabilities_t::wants_padding.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  void mirror_free_string (char * ptr)


Definition at line 314 of file mirror.c.


314                                    {
315   SAFE_FREE(ptr);
316 }






References SAFE_FREE.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int mirror_init_with_args (const char * args_json)


Initialize mirror mode with command-line style arguments


Parameters


args_json JSON array of argument strings, e.g.
  ["mirror", "--width", "80",
  "--height", "40"]


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 48 of file mirror.c.


48                                                  {
49   WASM_LOG("mirror_init_with_args: START");
50   WASM_LOG("mirror_init_with_args: After START log");
51 
52   // Initialize platform layer
53   WASM_LOG("Calling platform_init...");
54   WASM_LOG("mirror_init_with_args: About to call platform_init");
55   asciichat_error_t err = platform_init();
56   WASM_LOG("mirror_init_with_args: platform_init returned");
57   if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
58     WASM_ERROR("platform_init FAILED");
59     return -1;
60   }
61   WASM_LOG("platform_init OK");
62 
63   // Initialize logging to stderr (console.error in browser)
64   WASM_LOG("Calling log_init...");
65   log_init(NULL, LOG_DEBUG, true, false);
66   // Use debug-style format in WASM so browser console shows full log headers
67   log_set_format(OPT_LOG_TEMPLATE_DEFAULT_DEBUG, false);
68   WASM_LOG("log_init OK");
69 
70   // Parse space-separated arguments
71   WASM_LOG("Parsing arguments...");
72   char *args_copy = NULL;
73   char *argv[64] = {NULL};
74   int argc = wasm_parse_args(args_json, argv, 64, &args_copy);
75   if (argc < 0) {
76     WASM_ERROR("strdup FAILED");
77     return -1;
78   }
79   WASM_LOG_INT("Parsed arguments, argc", argc);
80 
81   // Initialize options (sets up RCU, defaults, etc.)
82   WASM_LOG("Calling options_init...");
83   err = options_init(argc, argv);
84   free(args_copy);
85 
86   if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
87     WASM_LOG_INT("options_init FAILED", err);
88     return -1;
89   }
90   WASM_LOG("options_init OK");
91 
92   // Initialize ANSI color code generation (dec3 cache for RGB values)
93   WASM_LOG("Calling ansi_fast_init...");
94   ansi_fast_init();
95   WASM_LOG("ansi_fast_init OK");
96 
97   WASM_LOG("mirror_init_with_args: COMPLETE");
98   return 0;
99 }






References ansi_fast_init(), ASCIICHAT_OK,
    LOG_DEBUG, log_init(), log_set_format(),
    OPT_LOG_TEMPLATE_DEFAULT_DEBUG, options_init(),
    platform_init(), WASM_ERROR, WASM_LOG,
    WASM_LOG_INT, and wasm_parse_args().
